resources.string: Generate stories, poems, and creative content with on-device AI. Unleash your imagination privately.

string-array.name: capability_prompts_creative_writing
string-array.item: Write a thrilling sci-fi scene about a rogue AI discovering emotion.
Write a cinematic script intro for a cyberpunk detective movie.
Compose an epic poem about humanity\'s journey to the stars.

resources.string: Condense long articles and documents into key points. Get the essence without the noise.

string-array.name: capability_prompts_summarization
string-array.item: Summarize the text below in 3 actionable bullet points:
Distill this complex text into a simple explanation for a 10-year-old:
Extract the main arguments and counter-arguments from this text:

resources.string: Get code explanations, debugging help, and generation assistance. Your on-device pair programmer.

string-array.name: capability_prompts_code_assistant
string-array.item: Write a Jetpack Compose UI component for a beautiful animated login screen.
Review the following Kotlin snippet for memory leaks and optimize it:
Explain the concept of Coroutines in Android with real-world examples.

resources.string: Generate detailed descriptions of any image. Perfect for accessibility and content creation.

string-array.name: capability_prompts_image_captioning
string-array.item: Describe the emotional mood, lighting, and composition of this image.
Write a creative, engaging social media caption for this photo.
Generate a highly detailed alt-text description for visually impaired users.

resources.string: Ask questions about images and get intelligent answers. See the world through AI eyes.

string-array.name: capability_prompts_visual_qa
string-array.item: Analyze the architectural style of the buildings in this scene.
What specific breed of dog is pictured, and what are its key features?
Based on the lighting and shadows, what time of day was this photo taken?

resources.string: Identify and classify objects in images with on-device processing. No data leaves your phone.

string-array.name: capability_prompts_object_detection
string-array.item: List all electronic devices visible in the scene and their approximate locations.
Identify and count all the different types of food items shown on the table.
Detect any potential safety hazards or obstacles visible in this environment.
